title: Ho Chi Minh City、Ho Chi Minh City — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Ho Chi Minh City、Ho Chi Minh City的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Ho Chi Minh City是Ho Chi Minh City的一个城市，人口约9,320,000。Vietnam’s largest city and economic engine, formerly Saigon, offering a dynamic mix of modern skyscrapers, French colonial architecture, and one of Southeast Asia’s most vibrant food scenes.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
